name: Vegan London Broil
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 lb Raw Seitan (2 boxes Seitan Quick Mix)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the seitan in an 8-inch square cake pan and allow it to rest until it takes the shape of the pan.
2. Place this pan inside a second, larger pan that is half-filled with water. Cover the larger pan.
3. Bake in a pre-heated oven at 375°F for 1 hour.
4. Remove the seitan from the pan and divide into eight equal pieces.
5. To the 1/2 gallon of water, add tamari, kombu, ginger, and seitan steaks. Cover the pot and bring to a simmer.
6. Cook for about 45 minutes (if using a pressure cooker, reduce liquid by one half and cook for 20 to 25 minutes).
7. You may leave the steaks in the stock for several hours if desired. Remove the steaks from the stock and drain.
8. Brush with a little sauce and broil so they will be lightly browned.
9. Serve steaks hot with additional sauce.
